text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm walking down a<n>tree-lined
street...
GRAWR!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Wha?! You dodged my bite attack?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Bleh! You're not the boss of me! I'm<n>not gonna
listen to anything anyone<n>says, and I won't lose
to anyone<n>either!
choice_data_list:
But if you do that to the wrong person, something
bad might ha―

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Aha! I hear the approaching footsteps<n>of my next
prey! Hehe! This one will<n>be my best catch yet!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Now! GRAWR!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: EEEEEEK?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! I WIN! YOU LOSE! Fear me,<n>weakling!
I'mma bite'cha real good!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! You're gonna give me even<n>more of the
good stuff?! You don't<n>skimp on the fan service
at all! Bite<n>me more! Bite me moooore!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
...What? Why is she happy? Is she<n>immune to
my bites or something?
choice_data_list: Guess this means you lost, huh?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
...What? Why is she happy? Is she<n>immune to
my bites or something?
choice_data_list: Guess this means you lost, huh?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Grrr... So this is what you mean by<n>something
bad might happen.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Then I'll just choose who I bite next!
choice_data_list: That's not my point at all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooooh... The bad girl Umas are on<n>another level...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Shinko Windy learns absolutely<n>nothing from
today's events.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: I'll never admit defeat! NEVER! I feelzero regret about this, you hear?I'm not gonna lose to anyone! Never!Never!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Grawr! Graaawr! GRAAAAAAWR!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh. My. Gosh. She's! SO! CUUUUUTE!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: She fainted! Yes! I did it! I won!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear later that Shinko Windy went on<n>a biting
spree after that... and got an<n>earful from her dorm
leader, Hishi<n>Amazon.
